prerequisites: A Mixpanel account with Owner or Admin permissions on the project you want to sync (required to create a Service Account or manage credentials).
Your Mixpanel Project ID, found in the project settings, supplied inside the required `credentials` config object.
Knowledge of your project's data residency region (`US` or `EU`) so the connector targets the correct Mixpanel API endpoint.
Your project timezone (default `US/Pacific`) to align exported event timestamps with Mixpanel's reporting.

authMethods.name: Service Account (recommended)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a Mixpanel Service Account username plus its secret, supplied via the `credentials.api_secret` secret field (with the service account username and project ID in the `credentials` object). The connector sends these as HTTP Basic auth. Creating a Service Account requires Owner or Admin permissions, and the generated secret is shown only once, so store it immediately.

authMethods.name: Project Secret (deprecated)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with the project's API Secret, supplied via the `credentials.secret` secret field, sent as HTTP Basic auth. Mixpanel has deprecated this method with an end-of-life date of March 3, 2027, so prefer a Service Account for new configurations.

setupSteps.title: Create credentials in Mixpanel
setupSteps.body: For the recommended method, open Mixpanel Organization Settings or Project Settings and create a Service Account; copy the generated username and secret immediately, because the secret cannot be retrieved later. You must have Owner or Admin permissions. Alternatively, locate your project's API Secret for the deprecated Project Secret method.

setupSteps.title: Find your Project ID and region
setupSteps.body: Open your Mixpanel project settings to copy the Project ID. Note whether your project's data resides in the `US` or `EU` region so you can set the `region` field correctly; an incorrect region points the connector at the wrong Mixpanel endpoint.

setupSteps.title: Enter authentication and project details
setupSteps.body: In the connector's `credentials` object, choose Service Account and provide the username, project ID, and the secret (`credentials.api_secret`), or choose Project Secret and provide `credentials.secret`. Set `region` (`US` or `EU`) and `project_timezone` (default `US/Pacific`) to match your project.

setupSteps.title: Configure replication window and tuning options
setupSteps.body: Set `start_date` (YYYY-MM-DD; defaults to one year ago if blank) and optional `end_date` to bound replication. Optionally adjust `attribution_window` (default 5 days), `date_window_size` (default 30 days), `export_lookback_window` (default 0 seconds), `page_size` (default 1000), `num_workers` (default 3), and `select_properties_by_default` to auto-include newly added properties.
